data.title: Personalis, Inc. Announces $100 Million Stock Offering
data.description:
On November 28, 2025, Personalis, Inc. announced a $100 million common stock offering.

Key Highlights:

  • Filed a prospectus supplement for $100M stock sale.
  • Shares offered under an amended sales agreement.
  • Cooley LLP provided legal opinion on the offering.

Original SEC Filing: Personalis, Inc. [ PSNL ] - 8-K - Nov. 28, 2025

Disclaimer
This is an AI-powered summary. It may contain inaccuracies. Consider verifying important information with the source. Please note this summary is solely based on documents filed with the SEC.

data.title: Stocks stage big comeback in best Thanksgiving week since 2008. What comes next?
data.description:
By Joseph Adinolfi

Strong performance during Thanksgiving week is often followed by gains in December

Wall Street is feeling more optimistic about the chances of a Fed rate cut at December's meeting.

Stocks blessed investors with a rebound during the shortened Thanksgiving week of trading.

After a rocky month, the S&P 500 SPX and Dow Jones Industrial Average DJIA rose by 3.7% and 3.2%, respectively, in last week through Friday. For the S&P 500, this was the best performance during the holiday week since 2008.

Investors hoping to see more record highs before the new year should feel encouraged. Since 1950, when the S&P 500 has risen 2% or more during Thanksgiving week, the index continued to climb in December more than 80% of the time, according to Dow Jones Market Data.

   Year                                    Thanksgiving Week  December % Change 
   1950                                                   2.3%               4.6% 
   1954                                                   3.3%               5.1% 
   1957                                                   2.1%              -4.1% 
   1962                                                   2.3%               1.3% 
   1963                                                   5.2%               2.4% 
   1970                                                   2.6%               5.5% 
   1981                                                   2.8%              -3.0% 
   1998                                                   2.5%               5.6% 
   2003                                                   2.2%               5.1% 
   2008                                                  12.0%               0.8% 
   2012                                                   3.6%               0.7% 
   2020                                                   2.3%               3.7% 
   Average                                                2.3% 
   Median                                                 3.1% 
   % Higher                                              83.3% 
   Source: Dow Jones Market Data; FactSet

December has historically been a strong month for stocks, said Joseph Shaposhnik, founder and portfolio manager of the Rainwater Equity ETF RW.

Many attributed the market's good fortune this week to shifting expectations about an interest-rate cut in December. CME Group data showed futures traders were pricing in a roughly 87% chance of a cut on Friday.

"'Better late than never' turned out to be the stock market's story for November," said Chris Larkin, managing director of trading and investing at E*TRADE from Morgan Stanley, in comments shared with MarketWatch. "While it might be too soon to say we've seen the last of tech volatility, over the past five trading days the S&P 500 erased its November pullback, rallying from a nearly 10-week low to less than 1% below its record close."

But rates weren't the only thing sending stocks on a roller-coaster ride in November.

"This month was predominantly driven by doubts about AI," Shaposhnik said.

Even Nvidia's earnings weren't convincing enough to boost the market, although Alphabet Inc. shares (GOOGL) saw a big boost after Google unveiled Gemini 3, which some analysts say is now the best large language model available.

Read: Google's winning streak continues as viral Nano Banana gets an upgrade

That has caused the AI trade to splinter into two camps. Michael O'Rourke, chief market strategist at Jones Trading, explained that shares of Alphabet, Broadcom Inc. (AVGO) and other suppliers that work with the two companies have surged over the past couple of weeks, while shares of companies associated with OpenAI - like Nvidia Corp. (NVDA) - have lagged behind.

"We can't declare everyone a winner here," O'Rourke told MarketWatch.

Don't miss: Google is crushing it. Why that's worrying investors in Nvidia and other AI stocks.

The Nasdaq Composite COMP fell 1.5% in November, snapping a seven-month winning streak and logging its biggest monthly drop since March. The small-cap Russell 2000 RUT gained 5.5% this week, for its best weekly showing since November2024. It also rose for a seventh-straight month.

Read: Apple and nine more tech companies that have treated their shareholders like gold

-Joseph Adinolfi

This content was created by MarketWatch, which is operated by Dow Jones & Co. MarketWatch is published independently from Dow Jones Newswires and The Wall Street Journal.

data.title: Eric Sprott Announces Changes to His Holdings of Gold Terra Resource Corp.
data.description:
Toronto, Ontario--(Newsfile Corp. - November 28, 2025) - Eric Sprott announces that today, 2176423 Ontario Ltd., a corporation beneficially owned by him, acquired 20,000,000 Common Shares (Shares) of Gold Terra Resource Corp. at $0.10 per Share for total consideration of $2,000,000. A total of 5,000,000 Shares were purchased through a private placement, and 15,000,000 Shares were purchased by way of a share purchase agreement concurrent with such private placement.

Prior to the acquisition, Mr. Sprott beneficially owned and controlled 30,000,000 Shares representing approximately 7.3% of the outstanding Shares. Mr. Sprott now beneficially owns and controls 50,000,000 Shares representing approximately 10.7% of the outstanding Shares, being an increase in holdings to above 10% and, therefore, the filing of an early warning report.

The securities are held for investment purposes. Mr. Sprott has a long-term view of the investment and may acquire additional securities including on the open market or through private acquisitions or sell the securities including on the open market or through private dispositions in the future depending on market conditions, reformulation of plans and/or other relevant factors.

Gold Terra Resource's address is Suite 410 - 325 Howe Street, Vancouver, British Columbia, V6C 1Z7. A copy of the early warning report with respect to the foregoing will appear on Gold Terra Resource's profile on SEDAR+ at www.sedarplus.ca and may also be obtained by calling Mr. Sprott's office at (416) 945-3294 (2176423 Ontario Ltd., 7 King Street East, Suite 1106, Toronto, ON M5C 3C5).

To view the source version of this press release, please visit https://www.newsfilecorp.com/release/276308

data.title: Zefiro Methane Strengthens Balance Sheet with Strategic Shares for Debt Settlements
data.description:
Fort Lauderdale, Florida--(Newsfile Corp. - November 28, 2025) - ZEFIRO METHANE CORP. (Cboe CA: ZEFI) (FSE: Y6B) (OTCQB: ZEFIF) (the "Company", "Zefiro", or "ZEFI") announced today it has entered into debt settlement agreements (the "Debt Settlements") with two creditors (the "Creditors") to eliminate an aggregate of $407,855.97 CAD in outstanding debt (the "Debt").

The Debt Settlements will involve a combination of equity issuances and a significant write-down by the Creditors of the amounts owing to them pursuant to the Debt Settlements, the Company will issue an aggregate of 1,127,273 common shares in the capital of the Company (the "Debt Shares") and grant 400,000 stock options, each having an exercise price of $0.40 per share, a one-year expiration period from the date of grant, and vesting in accordance with the terms of Zefiro's stock option plan. The Debt Shares will be issued at a deemed price of $0.275 CAD per Debt Share. Notably, $97,855.97 CAD of the total Debt will be forgiven and settled for no value.

The Company views these strategic Debt Settlements as a positive step toward strengthening its balance sheet and reducing its overall debt obligations.

All common shares issued in connection with the Debt Settlement will be subject to a statutory four month and one day hold period, in accordance with the policies of the CBOE Canada Exchange ("CBOE") and applicable securities laws. The issuance of the Debt Shares is subject to certain conditions including the receipt of all necessary regulatory approvals, including the approval of the CBOE.

About Zefiro Methane Corp.

Zefiro is an Environmental Services Company, specializing in methane abatement. Zefiro strives to be a key commercial force towards Active Sustainability. Leveraging decades of operational expertise, Zefiro is building a new toolkit to clean up air, land, and water sources directly impacted by methane leaks. The Company has built a fully integrated ground operation driven by an innovative monetization solution for the emerging methane abatement marketplace. As an originator of high-quality U.S.-based methane offsets, Zefiro aims to generate long-term economic, environmental, and social returns.

For further information, please contact:

Zefiro Investor Relations

1 (800) 274-ZEFI (274-9334)

investor@zefiromethane.com

Forward-Looking Statements

This news release contains "forward-looking information" within the meaning of applicable Canadian securities legislation. Forward-looking information is often, but not always, identified by the use of words such as "seeks", "believes", "plans", "expects", "intends", "estimates", "anticipates" and statements that an event or result "may", "will", "should", "could" or "might" occur or be achieved and other similar expressions. In particular, this news release contains forward-looking information including statements regarding: the issuance of Debt Shares and options pursuant to the Debt Settlements. The forward-looking information reflects management's current expectations based on information currently available and are subject to a number of risks and uncertainties that may cause outcomes to differ materially from those discussed in the forward-looking information. Although the Company believes that the assumptions and factors used in preparing the forward-looking information are reasonable, undue reliance should not be placed on such information and no assurance can be given that such events will occur in the disclosed timeframes or at all. Forward-looking information in this news release is based on the opinions and assumptions of management considered reasonable as of the date hereof,. Although the Company believes that the assumptions and factors used in preparing the forward-looking information in this news release are reasonable, undue reliance should not be placed on such information. The forward-looking information included in this news release is made as of the date of this news release and the Company expressly disclaims any intention or obligation to update or revise any forward-looking information whether as a result of new information, future events or otherwise, except as required by applicable law.

###

To view the source version of this press release, please visit https://www.newsfilecorp.com/release/276287

data.title: Texas Mineral Resources Corp. SEC 10-K Report
data.description:
Texas Mineral Resources Corp., a company engaged in owning, acquiring, exploring, and developing mineral properties, has released its annual 10-K report. The report provides a comprehensive overview of the company's financial performance, business operations, strategic initiatives, and the challenges it faces. The company's primary focus is on the Round Top Project in Hudspeth County, Texas, a significant rare earth elements (REE) mining initiative.

Financial Highlights

  • Revenue: $0 million. The company had no revenues for the fiscal years ended August 31, 2025, and 2024.
  • Net Loss: $1.933 million. The company reported a net loss for the fiscal year ended August 31, 2025, compared to a net loss of $0.833 million for the fiscal year ended August 31, 2024.
  • Net Loss Per Common Share Basic and Diluted: $(0.03). The net loss per share increased from $(0.01) in the previous year.
  • Operating Expenses: $1.209 million. Total operating expenses increased from $0.954 million in the previous year.
  • Interest Income: $0.021 million. Interest income decreased from $0.036 million in the previous year.
  • Interest Expense: $0.746 million. Interest expense was incurred due to the accretion of debt discount associated with the value assigned to detachable warrants.

Business Highlights

  • Business Overview: The company is focused on the Round Top Project, a 950-acre rare earths site with leases expiring in 2030, and additional prospecting permits covering 9,345 acres.
  • Operational Strategy: The strategy includes developing a metallurgical process to extract metals from rhyolite, conducting engineering and design work, and completing a bankable feasibility study.
  • Rare Earth Elements (REE) Demand: Global demand for REEs is projected to increase due to their critical role in technologies such as cell phones, clean energy, and defense applications. The company aims to develop domestic resources as a strategic necessity due to limited production outside China.
  • Round Top Project Milestones: Recent achievements include successful breaker trials to increase mine throughput, CIX separation trials for extracting commercial quality rare earths, and membrane concentration trials. The focus remains on managing alumina content and maximizing lithium value.
  • Ownership and Agreements: The company holds an 18.715% membership interest in Round Top, with USA Rare Earth, LLC (USARE) as the operating manager. Agreements are in place to manage cash calls and potential dilution of its ownership interest.
  • Future Outlook: The company anticipates further dilution of its ownership interest in Round Top due to insufficient capital to fund cash calls. It plans to raise additional capital to support future operations and maintain its interest in the project.
  • Potential Projects: The company is exploring new opportunities, including a potential joint venture with Santa Fe Gold Corporation for silver properties in New Mexico and a non-binding letter of intent with Steeple Rock Holding Company for a mining venture in New Mexico.
  • Regulatory Environment: The company operates under a complex regulatory framework, requiring various permits and compliance with environmental laws. Future changes in regulations could impact operations and economic feasibility.
  • Employee Structure: The company currently employs two full-time employees and utilizes consultants for geological, mineralogical, and accounting expertise.

Strategic Initiatives

  • Strategic Initiatives: The company is focused on developing the Round Top Project through its joint venture with USARE. The strategic goal is to establish a metallurgical process for extracting metals and to conduct necessary studies for a bankable feasibility study. The company is also exploring new mining opportunities, such as the potential joint venture with Santa Fe Gold Corporation for a silver property in New Mexico.
  • Capital Management: The company engaged in debt financing activities, issuing $1,098,000 in convertible promissory notes with detachable warrants, which were later converted into common stock. This conversion helped manage the company's capital structure by reducing debt obligations. Additionally, the company issued warrants to purchase common stock, which were partially exercised, providing $630,000 in cash. The company has not paid any dividends and has no current plans to do so.
  • Future Outlook: The company anticipates further dilution of its interest in the Round Top Project if it cannot meet future cash calls, as it currently lacks sufficient capital to fund these obligations. The company plans to raise additional capital through equity or debt financing to support its strategic initiatives and general administrative expenses beyond August 2026. The company is also considering potential short-term loans from directors to meet immediate financial needs.

Challenges and Risks

  • Investment Risks: The company faces significant risks related to its investment in Round Top, including the inability to fund cash calls, which could lead to dilution of its membership interest. This dilution could reduce the company's interest to a minimum of 3%, impacting its value and the value of its common stock.
  • Operational Risks: The company has a history of losses and requires additional financing to fund operations. The failure to obtain sufficient financing could lead to curtailment or cessation of operations.
  • Exploration Risks: The Round Top Project is in the exploration stage, with no assurance of establishing commercially exploitable mineral reserves. The project faces high risks typical of exploration and development, including environmental hazards, regulatory compliance, and potential opposition from various groups.
  • Market Risks: Fluctuations in demand and prices for rare earth minerals could significantly affect the company's financial results. The company is also exposed to macroeconomic conditions, such as high inflation and interest rates, which could impact its business and liquidity.
  • Regulatory Risks: The company operates under a complex regulatory framework, requiring various permits and compliance with environmental laws. Future changes in regulations could impact operations and economic feasibility.
  • Management Strategies: Management acknowledges the challenges of raising capital and the potential for significant dilution of its membership interest in Round Top. The company plans to continue incurring dilution rather than funding cash calls, given its current financial constraints. Management is focused on securing financing to support operations and exploring new mining opportunities, although there is no assurance of success.

SEC Filing: Texas Mineral Resources Corp. [ TMRC ] - 10-K - Nov. 28, 2025

data.title: Vivakor Files 8K - Unregistered Equity Sales >VIVK
data.description:
Vivakor Inc. (VIVK) filed a Form 8K - Unregistered Sales of Equity - with the U.S Securities and Exchange Commission on November 28, 2025.

On November 26, 2025, we issued an aggregate of 3,616,310 shares of our restricted common stock for dividends owed on our Series A Preferred Stock for July 31, 2025 and October 31, 2025 to the holders of our Series A Preferred Stock. Of those shares, an aggregate of 1,889,590 shares were issued to Jorgan Development, LLC and JBAH Holdings, LLC, entities controlled by James Ballengee, our Chief Executive Officer, or their assignees. The issuance of the foregoing securities was exempt from registration pursuant to Section 4(a)(2) of the Securities Act promulgated thereunder as the holders sophisticated investors and familiar with our operations.

On November 26, 2025, we issued 1,557,808 shares of our restricted common stock to a consultant under the terms of a Consulting Agreement. The issuance of the foregoing securities was exempt from registration pursuant to Section 4(a)(2) of the Securities Act promulgated thereunder as the holders sophisticated investors and familiar with our operations.

On November 26, 2025, we issued 82,500 shares of our restricted common stock to an investor as inducement shares under a previously disclosed Securities Purchase Agreement. The issuance of the foregoing securities was exempt from registration pursuant to Section 4(a)(2) of the Securities Act promulgated thereunder as the holders sophisticated investors and familiar with our operations.

The full text of this SEC filing can be retrieved at: https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1450704/000182912625009516/vivakorinc_8k.htm

Any exhibits and associated documents for this SEC filing can be retrieved at: https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1450704/000182912625009516/0001829126-25-009516-index.htm

Public companies must file a Form 8-K, or current report, with the SEC generally within four days of any event that could materially affect a company's financial position or the value of its shares.
